name: Harbor
verificationPolicy: Facts are limited to current first-party Harbor and Steam material. Unknown details are not estimated.

notes: No exact release day or month is currently announced.
No launch price is currently published.
The developer says the full version is expected to cost more than the Early Access version, but no amount is listed.

platforms.note: Not currently announced does not mean never; it records the public evidence on the verification date. Epic Online Services use does not by itself confirm an Epic Games Store release.

setting: A post-apocalyptic open-world wasteland built around scarce resources and one safe zone called Harbor.

gameplay.coreObjective: Survive and protect the limited resources collected in the wasteland.
confirmedSystems: Crafting tools, weapons, clothing, and essential equipment
High-stakes death where carried progress can be lost

safeZone.name: Harbor
safeZone.status: The game world's only safe zone

gameplay.vehicleFact: Vehicles are required to catch the War Truck and train that provide valuable resources.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i3-4170 or AMD FX-8120
minimum.graphics: Compatible GeForce GTX 1080-2070 3GB+ or AMD equivalent, as currently written on Steam

recommended.processor: Intel Core i5-8400 or AMD Ryzen 7 1800X
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 or AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT

systemRequirements.bootProtection: Secure Boot and TPM 2.0 are listed as required
systemRequirements.changeWarning: Requirements may change during development; the official Steam page is the controlling source.

comparisonBoundaries.affiliations: Harbor is an original game and is not affiliated with Rust, DayZ, SCUM, Mad Max, Fallout, or their owners.
comparisonBoundaries.quality: Harbor is unreleased and has no public user reviews, so superiority or final-quality claims are unsupported.
comparisonBoundaries.zombies: Zombies or infected enemies are not identified as Harbor's defining threat in the current official Steam description.
